schemas.name: Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: AI-powered CA and IBBI Registered Valuer firm offering IBBI-compliant valuations (ESOP, FEMA, Income Tax, Companies Act, SEBI, IBC, 409A, complex instruments, AIF), FEMA compliance, GST and income tax appeals, forensic accounting, company registration, and secretarial services across India.

address.streetAddress: G-131, Ground Floor, Phase 3, Spencer Plaza Mall, Anna Salai
Workafella, AK Estate, SV Road, off Veer Savarkar Flyover, Goregaon West

recognizedBy.name: Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI)
Institute of Company Secretaries of India (ICSI)
Insolvency and Bankruptcy Board of India (IBBI)

schemas.paymentAccepted: Cash, Credit Card, Debit Card, UPI, Bank Transfer, NEFT, RTGS

schemas.name: AI-Powered CA & Registered Valuer Firm | Virtual Auditor
schemas.description: IBBI Registered Valuer firm: startup & company valuation, FEMA compliance, GST/IT appeals, forensic accounting, company registration. AI-powered. Since 2012. Chennai, Bangalore, Mumbai.

mainEntity.name: How much does Private Limited Company registration cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: All-inclusive from ₹8,999 covering government fees, DSC, DIN, SPICe+ filing, MOA/AOA, PAN/TAN. No hidden charges. 5-15 working days. Post-registration compliance support included.

mainEntity.name: Pvt Ltd vs LLP — which should I register?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pvt Ltd if you plan to raise VC/angel funding (can issue equity shares). LLP for professional practices and bootstrapped businesses (lighter compliance, no statutory audit below ₹40L turnover). OPC for solo entrepreneurs. We advise based on your specific business plan.

mainEntity.name: How much does a startup valuation cost?

acceptedAnswer.text: Pre-revenue valuation from ₹25,000. Growth-stage DCF from ₹50,000. Multi-framework (FEMA + Income Tax + 409A) from ₹1,00,000. 18 methods with 10,000 Monte Carlo simulations. Fixed-fee quotes after free consultation. Contact +91 99622 60333.

mainEntity.name: What is an IBBI Registered Valuer?

acceptedAnswer.text: A professional registered with IBBI under the IBBI (Registered Valuers) Regulations, 2017. Only Registered Valuers can issue valuation reports under the Companies Act (Section 247) and IBC (Regulation 35). CA V. Viswanathan holds IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333 for Securities & Financial Assets.

mainEntity.name: How do I register for GST?

acceptedAnswer.text: GST registration is filed online using Form REG-01. Required documents: PAN, Aadhaar, address proof, bank details. Mandatory for turnover above ₹40 lakhs (goods) or ₹20 lakhs (services), and compulsory for e-commerce sellers. We handle the complete process in 3-7 working days.

mainEntity.name: Can you help with GST appeals and show cause notices?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. Section 107 appeals (Appellate Authority), Section 112 (GST Tribunal), and DRC-01 show cause notice responses. AI-assisted order analysis extracts demand amounts, computes pre-deposits, and maps issues to case law. Data-driven contest-or-accept decisions within 24 hours.

mainEntity.name: Do you file income tax returns and handle IT notices?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. ITR-1 to ITR-7 for individuals, companies, LLPs, trusts. Tax planning advisory. For IT notices — Section 142(1), 143(2) scrutiny, Section 148 reassessment, penalty proceedings. CIT(A) and ITAT appeal representation.

mainEntity.name: What FEMA services do you provide?

acceptedAnswer.text: FDI reporting (FC-GPR/FC-TRS), ECB compliance, ODI advisory, LRS guidance, FEMA compounding for late filings, 15CA/15CB certification for foreign remittances, and cross-regulatory conflict detection (FEMA vs Rule 11UA vs Companies Act pricing).

mainEntity.name: What is forensic accounting and who needs it?

acceptedAnswer.text: Forensic accounting applies CFE investigation techniques to detect financial fraud, embezzlement, and misrepresentation. Needed by: PE/VC investors for due diligence, companies investigating employee fraud, boards handling whistleblower complaints, and litigants requiring expert witness testimony.

mainEntity.name: How long does trademark registration take?

acceptedAnswer.text: 12-18 months end-to-end. Use ™ immediately after filing; ® only after Registration Certificate. Government fee: ₹4,500 (individual/startup) or ₹9,000 (others) per class. We handle search, filing, objection response, opposition defence, and renewal.

mainEntity.name: What company secretary services do you offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Board resolution drafting, statutory register maintenance, ROC annual filings (AOC-4, MGT-7), director appointment/resignation (DIR-12), share transfers, increase in authorised capital (SH-7), name change, registered office change, and winding up. Qualified ACS on the team.

mainEntity.name: What credentials does CA V. Viswanathan hold?

acceptedAnswer.text: FCA (ICAI), ACS (ICSI), CFE (ACFE USA), and IBBI Registered Valuer (IBBI/RV/03/2019/12333). 14+ years of multi-regulatory practice across valuation, FEMA, tax appeals, forensic accounting, and corporate governance.

mainEntity.name: How is Virtual Auditor different from ClearTax or IndiaFilings?

acceptedAnswer.text: We are a practicing CA firm with IBBI Registered Valuer credentials, not a compliance aggregator. Valuations use 18 methods with Monte Carlo simulations. Appeals handled by the founder personally. Aggregators route work to junior freelancers.
Yes. Free 30-minute consultation. Call +91 99622 60333 (Chennai), +91 95139 39333 (Bangalore), +91 77000 89597 (Mumbai), or email support@virtualauditor.in.
